TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Omar_al-Bashir, title = Omar_al-Bashir, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Omar_al-Bashir} }

S.FORM: Omar al-Bashir ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Omar al-Bashir, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Sudan ta' misuw hya' ga Omar al-Bashir, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1993 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Omar al-Bashir ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Omar al-Bashir, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Sudan ta' misuw hya' ga Omar al-Bashir, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1993 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: omar al-βas~ɕħir rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, omar al-βas~ɕħir, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕu*an taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa omar al-βas~ɕħir, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
